description: You are a backend developer resolving 5 critical SQLAlchemy ORM bugs in a digital media store application connected to a legacy Chinook SQLite database at /home/ga/workspace/orm_project/. Resolve the N+1 queries in the artist endpoint, missing cascade deletions, self-referential model mapping errors for employees, float precision bugs in revenue calculation, and inefficient in-memory aggregations. Ensure all tests in `pytest tests/` pass.
